central_schemes.name: Stand Up India
central_schemes.benefit: Bank loans Rs 10 lakh - Rs 1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs
central_schemes.eligibility: SC/ST and women entrepreneurs setting up greenfield enterprises

central_schemes.name: PM Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
central_schemes.benefit: Collateral-free loans up to Rs 10 lakh for micro enterprises

central_schemes.name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
central_schemes.benefit: Zero-balance bank account + insurance + overdraft facility

central_schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card for Fisheries/Animal Husbandry
central_schemes.benefit: Short-term credit at subsidized rates for non-farm allied sectors

central_schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
central_schemes.benefit: Rs 3 lakh collateral-free loan at 5% + skill training + toolkit

central_schemes.name: NABARD Rural Credit Support
central_schemes.benefit: Refinance to cooperative banks for rural credit at low rates

central_schemes.name: Credit Guarantee Fund for MSEs
central_schemes.benefit: Collateral-free loans up to Rs 2 crore for micro/small enterprises
central_schemes.eligibility: Micro and small enterprises (new and existing)

central_schemes.name: PM Street Vendor AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (SVANidhi)
central_schemes.benefit: Working capital loans Rs 10K → Rs 20K → Rs 50K with digital credit score

central_schemes.name: National Rural Livelihoods Mission (SHG Credit)
central_schemes.benefit: Collateral-free loans via SHG bank linkage at 7% interest
central_schemes.eligibility: Women SHG members in rural areas

central_schemes.name: Gold Monetisation Scheme
central_schemes.benefit: Interest 2.25-2.5% p.a. on idle gold deposited with banks
central_schemes.eligibility: All individuals, HUFs, trusts with gold

central_schemes.name: Sovereign Gold Bond Scheme
central_schemes.benefit: 2.5% annual interest + capital gains on gold price appreciation

central_schemes.name: PM CARES for Orphan Children (Education + Finance)
central_schemes.benefit: Free education + Rs 10 lakh corpus at 23 for COVID orphans
central_schemes.eligibility: Children who lost both parents to COVID-19

central_schemes.name: Microfinance via SIDBI (Priority Sector)
central_schemes.benefit: Low-interest microfinance through NBFC-MFIs for poor
central_schemes.eligibility: Borrowers with income < Rs 3 lakh (rural) / Rs 3.6 lakh (urban)

central_schemes.name: Venture Capital Fund for SC/ST Entrepreneurs
central_schemes.benefit: Concessional finance up to Rs 50 lakh for SC/ST startups
central_schemes.eligibility: SC/ST entrepreneurs with viable business plans

central_schemes.name: Dairy Entrepreneurship Development Scheme
central_schemes.benefit: 25-33% back-ended subsidy on dairy infrastructure loans
central_schemes.eligibility: Farmers, individual entrepreneurs for dairy units
